title: cistanthe floresiorum
intro: Cistanthe floresiorum, also known as Purple Sage, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Montiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. Cistanthe floresiorum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
